hpp.objects.trailblazerWastelandTraining:
{Trailblazer}

The trailblazer shows your army the hidden paths of the wasteland. Your Shamans learn to command harsher spirits and become Great Shamans, while your Ogres are initiated into battle magic as Ogre Magi.
